name: Peach-Melon Frozen Yogurt
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Frozen mixed fruit (peaches, melon, grapes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Start with frozen fruit and you'll have a delicious, fresh-tasting frozen yogurt in 5 minutes.
2. For convenience, commercially packaged mixed frozen fruit can be used; strawberries, bananas, blueberries (alone or combined) are also delicious, but avoid seedy fruits like raspberries.
3. In a food processor, combine the frozen fruit and sugar.
4. Process on/off until coarsely chopped, scraping down the sides of the work bowl once or twice.
5. Stir together yogurt and lemon juice.
6. With the machine running, gradually pour the yogurt mixture through the feed tube.
7. Process until smooth and creamy, scraping down the sides of the work bowl once or twice.
8. Scoop the frozen yogurt into freezer-proof serving dishes, cover, and freeze 15 to 30 minutes to firm up slightly.
